vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. There is zero evidence of photosynthetic activity. The specimens have either been removed or have suffered total senescence and decomposition.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plant life across all four pots, suggesting a total biome collapse or clearing of the desk.
vision_report.narrative_description: My audit confirms that the botanical registry is currently mismatched with the physical reality of the desk. The pots are devoid of their assigned occupants. The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only non-soil element present. The environment is currently a 'dead' biome with no active plant specimens to observe.
